pages.text: Before you plant a row, the world has already seeded itself with food. $(italic)Farmer's Delight$() scatters wild crops across every plausible biome — gather as you travel.
pages.title: Wild Edibles

pages.text: $(bold)What grows wild:$()$(br)$(li)Wild Cabbage — plains & forests, rare$(li)Sea Beet (wild beetroot) — near beaches$(li)Wild Potato — cool biomes$(li)Wild Carrot — broadly across temperate$(li)Wild Onion — open meadows$(li)Tomato Vines — climbing on supports$(li)Wild Rice — swamp & marsh$(li)Brown / Red Mushroom Colonies — mushroom-field biomes$(li)Berry bushes — taiga

$(bold)The cooking surfaces$() — three pieces, all early.$(br2)$(bold)Stove$() — Lit by any flame; place atop fire/lava. Cooks raw food $(italic)while you walk$(). Pancakes and pies bake here.$(br2)$(bold)Cooking Pot$() — Place on a heat source. Up to six ingredients via the GUI; produces stews and meals.$(br2)$(bold)Skillet$() — Sears single items quickly. Doubles as a thrown weapon when held.
pages.title: Stove, Pot & Skillet

pages.text: $(bold)Knife & Cutting Board:$()$(br2)A Knife in the hotbar processes raw food into prepared pieces (beef → meat strips, cabbage → cabbage leaves). A wall-mounted Cutting Board does the same automatically: place a tool on it, right-click with an item, the tool processes the item. A Dispenser pointed at a Cutting Board operates it for you.
pages.title: Knife & Cutting Board

pages.text: $(bold)Vanilla soups have effects now.$() $(italic)Farmer's Delight$() buffs the vanilla soup line with minor effects via the $(italic)vanillaSoupExtraEffects$() config (enabled). Notably:$(br)$(li)$(italic)Rabbit Stew$() → Jump Boost$(li)$(italic)Mushroom Stew$() → minor effect$(li)$(italic)Beetroot Soup$() → minor effect$(br2)Don't reflexively cook them away as second-rate food — they're now real utility.
pages.title: Soup Effects
